# Sitemap Architecture Audit — Sunflo Detailing
**Date:** 2026-04-21
**Site:** https://sunflodetailing.com
**Sitemap:** https://sunflodetailing.com/sitemap.xml (dynamic, generated by `/src/app/sitemap.ts`)

---

## 1. Live Sitemap Inventory

> Note: Live fetch requires Bash/network permission. The following URL list is derived from static analysis of `src/app/sitemap.ts`, `src/data/service-pages.ts`, and `src/data/city-pages.ts`, which are the exact sources the Next.js sitemap route iterates. The generated output is deterministic.

**Total URLs in sitemap: 15**

| # | URL | lastmod | priority | changeFrequency |
|---|-----|---------|----------|-----------------|
| 1 | https://sunflodetailing.com/ | build time | 1.0 | monthly |
| 2 | https://sunflodetailing.com/services | build time | 0.9 | monthly |
| 3 | https://sunflodetailing.com/services/ceramic-coating | build time | 0.85 | monthly |
| 4 | https://sunflodetailing.com/services/paint-correction | build time | 0.85 | monthly |
| 5 | https://sunflodetailing.com/services/paint-protection-film | build time | 0.85 | monthly |
| 6 | https://sunflodetailing.com/services/window-tinting | build time | 0.85 | monthly |
| 7 | https://sunflodetailing.com/locations/fort-lauderdale | build time | 0.75 | monthly |

| 9 | https://sunflodetailing.com/locations/pompano-beach | build time | 0.75 | monthly |

| 11 | https://sunflodetailing.com/locations/lighthouse-point | build time | 0.75 | monthly |

| 13 | https://sunflodetailing.com/gallery | build time | 0.8 | monthly |

| 15 | https://sunflodetailing.com/contact | build time | 0.7 | yearly |

---

## 2. Format Validation

| Check | Result | Notes |
|-------|--------|-------|
| Valid XML structure | PASS | Standard Next.js MetadataRoute.Sitemap output |
| UTF-8 encoding | PASS | Next.js default |
| URL count under 50,000 limit | PASS | 15 URLs |
| Correct namespace (`http://www.sitemaps.org/schemas/sitemap/0.9`) | PASS | Next.js handles this |
| Non-200 / redirect URLs | UNKNOWN | Requires live HTTP check; no obvious broken routes in codebase |
| Noindexed URLs in sitemap | PASS | `robots.ts` allows all pages; no per-page noindex found |
| `priority` values present | WARN — INFO | Google ignores `priority` entirely; can be removed |
| `changeFrequency` values present | WARN — INFO | Google ignores `changeFrequency` entirely; can be removed |
| `lastmod` accuracy | WARN | All dates are set to `new Date()` at build time — every URL shows the same deployment timestamp regardless of when content actually changed. Google treats identical lastmod dates across all URLs as a signal the dates are unreliable and may deprioritize them. |

---

## 3. Service Coverage Analysis

`src/data/services.ts` defines **22 services**. Only those with a `slug` field in the data get a dedicated detail page and a sitemap entry. The remaining 18 services fall back to `/services` in footer links.

### Services WITH a slug (have detail pages, in sitemap)

| Service ID | Slug | URL |
|-----------|------|-----|
| ceramic-coating | `ceramic-coating` | /services/ceramic-coating |
| paint-correction | `paint-correction` | /services/paint-correction |
| ppf | `paint-protection-film` | /services/paint-protection-film |
| window-tinting | `window-tinting` | /services/window-tinting |

### Services WITHOUT a slug (no detail page, not in sitemap)

| Service ID | Service Name | Category | quoteOnly |
|-----------|-------------|----------|-----------|
| auto-detail-level-1 | Level 1 Auto Detailing | core | No |
| auto-detail-level-2 | Level 2 Auto Detailing | core | No |
| auto-detail-level-3 | Level 3 Auto Detailing | core | No |
| mini-interior | Mini Interior Refresh | core | No |
| complete-interior | Complete Interior Detailing | core | No |
| gloss-enhancement | Gloss Enhancement Package | core | No |
| paint-enhancement | Paint Enhancement Package | core | No |
| lease-return | Lease Return Package | specialty | Yes |
| new-vehicle-protection | New Vehicle Protection | specialty | Yes |
| boat-rv | Boat & RV Detailing | specialty | Yes |
| custom-job | Custom / Special Request | specialty | Yes |
| vinyl-wraps | Vinyl Wraps | alacarte | Yes |
| headlight-restoration | Headlight Restoration | alacarte | Yes |
| engine-bay-detail | Engine Bay Detail | alacarte | Yes |
| leather-reconditioning | Leather Reconditioning | alacarte | Yes |
| convertible-top-care | Convertible Top Care | alacarte | Yes |
| odor-removal | Odor Removal / Ozone Treatment | alacarte | Yes |

**18 of 22 services have no dedicated landing page and no sitemap URL.**

---

## 4. Location Page Coverage

### Pages in `cityPages` (exist in sitemap)
- /locations/fort-lauderdale
- /locations/wilton-manors
- /locations/pompano-beach
- /locations/deerfield-beach
- /locations/lighthouse-point

### Cities in `areaServed` (layout.tsx JSON-LD) with NO location page

| City | areaServed | Location Page | Status |
|------|-----------|---------------|--------|
| Oakland Park | Yes | No page needed (home base, not a target city) | Acceptable |
| Fort Lauderdale | Yes | Yes | OK |
| Wilton Manors | Yes | Yes | OK |
| Pompano Beach | Yes | Yes | OK |
| Lighthouse Point | Yes | Yes | OK |
| Lauderdale-by-the-Sea | Yes | **MISSING** | Gap |
| Deerfield Beach | Yes | Yes | OK |

**`Lauderdale-by-the-Sea` is claimed in the site's LocalBusiness JSON-LD `areaServed` but has no corresponding `/locations/lauderdale-by-the-sea` page.** This creates a schema-to-content inconsistency: Google sees the business claiming to serve this city but finds no supporting content for it.

### Location page quality gate check
5 location pages is well under the 30-page warning threshold. Each city page has city-specific intro copy, 4 substantive H2 sections (400–700 words each), unique local hooks, and distinct angles (marine environment, commuter corridors, affluent demographics). Quality gate: PASS.

---

## 5. Orphaned Pages (in app directory but not in sitemap)

| Path | In Sitemap | Notes |
|------|-----------|-------|
| /api/contact | No | API route — correct, should not be in sitemap |
| /locations (index) | No | **Does not exist as a page.tsx** |

No orphaned indexable pages found. The app directory matches the sitemap exactly.

## 6. Internal Link Coverage

**All 15 sitemap URLs are reachable from the homepage via internal links — verified through nav and footer analysis.**

| URL | Reachable From | Link Source |
|-----|---------------|-------------|
| / | Direct | Navbar logo |
| /services | Yes | Navbar, Footer Quick Links |
| /services/ceramic-coating | Yes | Footer Services list, city page service cards |
| /services/paint-correction | Yes | Footer Services list, city page service cards |
| /services/paint-protection-film | Yes | Footer Services list, city page service cards |
| /services/window-tinting | Yes | Footer Services list, city page service cards |
| /locations/fort-lauderdale | Yes | Footer Service Area column |
| /locations/wilton-manors | Yes | Footer Service Area column |
| /locations/pompano-beach | Yes | Footer Service Area column |
| /locations/deerfield-beach | Yes | Footer Service Area column |
| /locations/lighthouse-point | Yes | Footer Service Area column |
| /about | Yes | Navbar, Footer Quick Links |
| /gallery | Yes | Navbar, Footer Quick Links |
| /faq | Yes | Navbar, Footer Quick Links |
| /contact | Yes | Navbar (Book Now CTA), Footer Quick Links |

**Broken internal link found:** The breadcrumb JSON-LD on city pages and the breadcrumb rendered in `[city]/page.tsx` reference `/locations` as position 2 in the list (`item: "https://sunflodetailing.com/locations"`). This URL returns a 404 — there is no `src/app/locations/page.tsx`. Googlebot will encounter a 404 when following this breadcrumb link.

---

## 7. Priority Recommendations — New Pages by Traffic Potential

The biggest gap is 18 services with no dedicated pages. For local intent searches ("interior detailing Oakland Park", "ceramic coating Fort Lauderdale"), a `/services/[slug]` page significantly outperforms a shared `/services` page. The four existing service detail pages are the site's strongest organic assets; the pattern should be extended.

### Tier 1 — High Value, Build First

| Page | Target Query | Difficulty | Why |
|------|-------------|-----------|-----|
| `/services/auto-detailing` (or level-1/2/3 hub) | "auto detailing Oakland Park", "car detailing Fort Lauderdale" | Medium | These are the broadest-volume detailing queries in the market. A hub page covering the three tiers with pricing captures the most searches. Alternatively, individual pages per tier. |
| `/services/interior-detailing` | "interior car detailing near me", "car interior detail Oakland Park" | Medium | Interior detailing is a high-volume, separate intent from exterior. The two interior services (mini + complete) justify a dedicated page. |
| `/services/paint-protection-film` already exists | — | — | Already done |

### Tier 2 — Strong ROI, Build Second

| Page | Target Query | Difficulty | Why |
|------|-------------|-----------|-----|
| `/services/vinyl-wraps` | "vinyl wrap Fort Lauderdale", "chrome delete near me" | Medium-High | Wrap searches have high commercial intent and above-average ticket size. Competitive but worth a page. |
| `/services/boat-rv-detailing` | "boat detailing Pompano Beach", "marine detailing Fort Lauderdale" | Low-Medium | Low competition, highly local, and South Florida has genuine demand. Differentiates the business from standard car-only shops. |
| `/services/new-car-protection` | "new car protection package Florida", "new vehicle ceramic coating" | Low | High-ticket service, low competition for exact-match pages. Customers actively search for this before delivery day. |
| `/locations/lauderdale-by-the-sea` | "auto detailing Lauderdale-by-the-Sea" | Low | Already in `areaServed` JSON-LD — adds the supporting page to back up the schema claim. Closes the schema-to-content gap. |

### Tier 3 — Long-tail, Lower Volume but Zero Competition

| Page | Target Query | Notes |
|------|-------------|-------|
| `/services/headlight-restoration` | "headlight restoration Oakland Park" | Very low competition, frequently searched add-on |
| `/services/odor-removal` | "car odor removal Fort Lauderdale", "ozone treatment car near me" | Distressed-buyer intent, converts well |
| `/services/lease-return-detailing` | "lease return detailing near me" | Time-sensitive, high-intent searchers |
| `/services/engine-bay-detail` | "engine bay detail near me" | Niche but uncontested locally |

---

## 8. Issues Summary

| Severity | Issue | File / Location | Action |
|----------|-------|-----------------|--------|
| Medium | `priority` and `changeFrequency` fields present in sitemap | `src/app/sitemap.ts` | Remove both fields — Google ignores them and they add noise |
| Medium | All `lastmod` values set to `new Date()` at build time | `src/app/sitemap.ts` | Replace with static per-page dates that reflect actual content modification dates |
| Medium | `/locations` breadcrumb URL returns 404 | `src/app/locations/[city]/page.tsx` (breadcrumb JSON-LD + visual breadcrumb) | Either create a `src/app/locations/page.tsx` index, or change breadcrumb item 2 to `/services` or `/` |
| Low | `Lauderdale-by-the-Sea` in `areaServed` JSON-LD has no location page | `src/app/layout.tsx` | Either add `/locations/lauderdale-by-the-sea` to `cityPages`, or remove the city from `areaServed` |
| Info | 18 of 22 services have no dedicated SEO landing page | `src/data/services.ts` | Add `slug` fields and `servicePages` entries for high-value services per Tier 1/2 above |

---

## 9. Score

**Sitemap Architecture Score: 64 / 100**

| Category | Points Available | Score | Notes |
|----------|-----------------|-------|-------|
| Format validity | 15 | 13 | Valid XML, correct structure. Loses 2 for deprecated fields (priority, changeFrequency) |
| URL completeness | 25 | 12 | Only 4 of 22 services have pages. Major gap in crawlable service content. |
| lastmod accuracy | 10 | 4 | All dates are build-time identical — signals to Google the dates are unreliable |
| Location coverage | 15 | 11 | 5 of 6 claimed service area cities have pages. Lauderdale-by-the-Sea gap costs 4 points. |
| Internal link integrity | 15 | 11 | All sitemap URLs reachable from homepage. /locations breadcrumb 404 costs 4 points. |
| Schema consistency | 10 | 7 | areaServed vs page coverage mismatch for one city |
| robots.txt alignment | 10 | 10 | robots.ts correctly points to sitemap, no pages blocked that should be indexed |

**What would bring this to 90+:**
1. Add service detail pages for auto detailing tiers and interior detailing (biggest single lift)
2. Fix lastmod to use static real dates per page
3. Add /locations/lauderdale-by-the-sea or remove it from areaServed
4. Create /locations/page.tsx (or fix breadcrumb) to resolve the 404
5. Strip priority and changeFrequency from sitemap.ts
